title: Crispy Pork Gratin
description: A German-inspired dish featuring a crispy topping and creamy gratin, perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: In a pan, sauté the diced ham and crispy onions until caramelized.
In a separate saucepan, prepare the creamy sauce.
In a baking dish, arrange the torn bread to form a crust.
Add the sautéed ham mixture on top of the bread.
Pour the creamy sauce over the ham mixture.
Top with grated cheese and bake for 20 minutes.
Increase oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
